jitvara a. [ji-kvarap] (rī f.) Victorious, conquering, triumphant; śastrāṇyupāyaṃsata jitvarāṇi  Bk. 1. 16 ; karadīkṛtabhūpālo bhātṛbhirjitvarairdiśāṃ  Śi. 2. 9. 
— rī N. of the city Benares.
